positive: A minimalist, stylized composition featuring a geometric pattern of interconnected constellations and celestial bodies, rendered in thick, bold lines and negative space. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, cosmic sapphire blue, muted gold, and stark white. Focus on a circular or symmetrical design suitable for placement on fabric. The style should blend modern ethnic geometry with cosmic symbolism, giving a sense of mystical wanderlust. The composition must be clean, with strong contrast between the dark background and the luminous geometric elements, optimized for a clean apparel print texture. Perfect central placement, highly detailed line work, vector quality, symmetrical design, isolated on white background for mockup versatility.
